sections.heading: What is Formal Writing?
sections.explanation: Writing style changes based on WHO you are writing to and WHY.
formal_used_when: Writing to someone you don't know well

comparison.situation: Telling someone you can't attend a meeting
comparison.informal: Hey! So sorry, can't make it tomorrow. Something came up 😅 Maybe next time? xx
comparison.formal:
Dear Mr. Thompson,

I am writing to inform you that I will be unable to attend the meeting scheduled for tomorrow, January 21st. I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. Please let me know if we could reschedule at a time that is convenient for you.

Yours sincerely,
Sarah Johnson

differences_table.formal: 'Dear Mr. Smith,' or 'To Whom It May Concern,'

structure.name: Greeting/Salutation
structure.note: Use 'Ms.' when you don't know if a woman is married. Never assume 'Mrs.'

structure.name: Opening Line
examples: I am writing to inquire about...
I am writing with regard to...
I am writing to apply for...
Following up on my previous email...
I would like to bring to your attention...

structure.name: Body
structure: Paragraph 2: Details, context, or supporting info
Paragraph 3: What you need from them / next steps

structure.name: Closing Line
examples: Please do not hesitate to contact me if you require any further information.
I look forward to hearing from you.
I would appreciate a response at your earliest convenience.
Thank you for your time and consideration.
I await your response with interest.

structure.name: Sign-Off
know_moderately: Yours sincerely, (UK - when you used name)
dont_know: Yours faithfully, (UK - when you wrote 'Dear Sir/Madam')
structure.note: Then: Your full name, position, contact details

complete_example.subject: Request for Extension - Assignment 3
complete_example.body:
Dear Professor Martinez,

I am writing to request an extension for Assignment 3, which is currently due on Friday, January 24th, 2025.

Unfortunately, I have been unwell this week and was unable to attend classes on Monday and Tuesday. As a result, I have fallen behind with my research and do not believe I will be able to submit work of satisfactory quality by the current deadline.

I would be grateful if you could grant me an extension of five days, until Wednesday, January 29th. I assure you that I will submit the completed assignment by that date.

Please find attached a medical certificate confirming my illness. I apologize for any inconvenience caused.

Thank you for your understanding. I look forward to your response.

Yours sincerely,
James Walker
Student ID: 2024/STU/0892
james.walker@university.edu

sections.heading: Writing a Formal Letter
structure: Recipient's name and address - left side

complete_example.context: A complaint letter about a faulty laptop
complete_example.body:
45 Green Park Road
London, NW3 5TH
January 20, 2025

The Customer Service Manager
TechStore Electronics
82 Oxford Street
London, W1D 2EF

Dear Sir or Madam,

Re: Faulty Laptop - Order Number TS-2024-88762

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with a laptop I purchased from your store on January 5th, 2025. The product, a TechPro X500 laptop, has developed a significant fault that has rendered it unusable.

Specifically, the screen began displaying horizontal lines within three days of purchase, and the device now fails to start altogether. I have followed all the troubleshooting steps outlined in the user manual; however, the problem persists.

As the product clearly does not meet the standard I would reasonably expect, I would like to request either a full replacement or a complete refund within 14 days. I have enclosed the original receipt and photographs of the fault for your reference.

I trust that you will address this matter promptly. Please contact me at the above address or by telephone at 07700 900123.

Yours faithfully,
Michael Thompson

mistakes.wrong: I'm writing to let you know I can't attend.
mistakes.right: I am writing to inform you that I cannot attend.

wrong_examples: I wanna know more about the job.
right_examples: I would like to learn more about the position.

mistakes.right: Subject: Inquiry Regarding Job Opening - Ref: MKT2025

mistakes.wrong: I am absolutely furious about this!
mistakes.right: I am writing to express my concern about...

mistakes.wrong: I need to ask you about the meeting.
mistakes.right: I would like to inquire about the scheduled meeting.

right_examples: by the way (or just remove it)

mistakes.wrong: Writing everything in one long paragraph
mistakes.right: Separate different ideas into different paragraphs

tasks.instruction: Rewrite in FORMAL style (keep same meaning):
tasks.informal_text: hey i missed class yesterday can u send me the notes?? i was sick and couldn't come its really important for me. thanks a lot!!
tasks.model_answer:
Dear [Teacher's Name],

I am writing to request the class notes from yesterday's session, which I was unfortunately unable to attend due to illness.

I understand the importance of keeping up with the course material and would be grateful if you could share the relevant notes at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Yours sincerely,
[Your Name]

tasks.situation: Write an email to the manager of a restaurant where you had a bad experience. The food was cold, the service was slow, and you waited 45 minutes for your order.
requirements: What you want them to do
